library.name: eXeLearning embedded editor
library.description: Pre-built static assets of the eXeLearning v4 authoring editor, bundled to run embedded inside Moodle.

library.name: pipwerks SCORM API Wrapper
library.description: pipwerks SCORM wrapper used to bridge gradable iDevices with the LMS SCORM runtime.

library.name: pipwerks SCO Functions
library.description: pipwerks helper functions wrapping the SCORM API wrapper for gradable iDevices.
